sections.name: SECTION 1: Hook / Observation
sections.content_preview:
This our last email.

We haven't heard from you in a while, and we're respecting your inbox. If today isn't the right time, that's a real answer. The product will be here when you're ready. So will I

sections.name: SECTION 2: Recognition Anchors (R2 Block)
sections.content_preview:
Whether your child talks about the potty but doesn't use it, or you've been at this for years and stopped counting the attempts, if the signal isn't arriving, you're not alone in that.

sections.name: SECTION 4: Permission / Gentle Close
sections.content_preview: If your child's situation has changed, if you're ready to try something different down the road, you're always welcome back. If today isn't the day, that's okay. The science will still be here. The B
